---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## 🐛 Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 📋 Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## ✅ Expected Behavior

A clear description of what you expected to happen.

## ❌ Actual Behavior

A clear description of what actually happened.

## 📸 Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## 🖥️ Environment

- **Browser:** [e.g. Chrome 120.0.0]
- **OS:** [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
- **LinguaFlow Version:** [e.g. 1.0.0]
- **Platform:** [e.g. YouTube, Netflix, Max]

## 🔍 Console Errors

Open DevTools (F12) → Console tab and paste any errors:

```
[paste console errors here]
```

## 📝 Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.

## ✔️ Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to avoid duplicates
- [ ] I have included console errors (if any)
- [ ] I have included screenshots (if applicable)
- [ ] I have tested on the latest version
